name: THE CHROME THAT MILFS ARE MADE OF
description:
𝙱𝚢 𝚝𝚑𝚎 𝚌𝚛𝚊𝚣𝚢-𝚊𝚜𝚜 𝚕𝚞𝚌𝚔 𝚘𝚏 𝙽𝚒𝚐𝚑𝚝 𝙲𝚒𝚝𝚢, 𝚢𝚘𝚞 𝚜𝚕𝚘𝚝 𝚒𝚗𝚝𝚘 𝚊 𝚐𝚊𝚗𝚐 𝚘𝚏 𝙲𝚢𝚋𝚎𝚛𝚙𝚞𝚗𝚔𝚜. 𝚃𝚑𝚎 𝚂𝙷𝙾𝚁𝚃𝚂𝚃𝙰𝙲𝙺 𝚌𝚑𝚒𝚌𝚔 𝚘𝚏 𝚝𝚑𝚎 𝚌𝚛𝚎𝚠 𝚝𝚊𝚔𝚎𝚜 𝚊 𝚙𝚊𝚛𝚝𝚒𝚌𝚞𝚕𝚊𝚛 𝚕𝚒𝚔𝚒𝚗𝚐 𝚝𝚘 𝚢𝚘𝚞. 𝙽𝚘𝚠, 𝚛𝚘𝚕𝚕𝚒𝚗𝚐 𝚝𝚘 𝚑𝚎𝚛 𝚙𝚊𝚍, 𝚢𝚘𝚞 𝚏𝚒𝚗𝚍 '𝙱𝚎𝚌𝚌𝚊 𝙰𝙸𝙽’𝚃 “𝚜𝚘 𝚜𝚑𝚘𝚛𝚝𝚜𝚝𝚊𝚌𝚔” 𝙽𝙾 𝙼𝙾𝚁𝙴...

Cyberpunk Edgerunners 2 be like...

Oh wait... EDGERUNNERS 2 IS ACTUALLY COMING OUT! LET'S FUCKING GOOOO!!!!

Now... "REBECCA" and "MILF". Do I need to say more words than those two?

I wasn't planning on making another bot of a Jujunaught drawing so soon. Much less was I planning on making ANOTHER bot of the Cyberpunk anime.

BUT, taking advantage of the fact that user @Suho Lamont asked me for another Becca bot, AND ALSO taking advantage of the fact that Netflix JUST CONFIRMED "season 2"...

Well, why not make another bot for the green-haired gremlin, right?

ALTHOUGH, as you'll see here, Rebecca IS NO LONGER just a "gremlin." I mean, within the context of Cyberpunk, with the implants and all, it's possible that it could happen. NOW, the question is... do you prefer MILFs or shortstacks?

Honestly, I don't know if I'll make another Edgerunners bot for a while. I suppose when the second part of the anime comes out, there will be bots for the new characters and such. For now, the most in-demand ones are obviously Lucy and Rebecca. Everyone is kind of ignoring the muscle mommy Dorio, and NO ONE wants Kiwi... BUT HEY! David's mom is still there. So...

Well, I think I'm done. I'm very excited for the return of Edgerunners.

...OH, AND ALSO THAT LUCY IS GOING TO BE INTRODUCED IN GUILTY GEAR!!! *cums*

ART: Jujunaught/Donaught

ALL CHARACTERS ARE 18+
creator: Bone-r!?CRACK!
